BrightBurn (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,259,427Details
International Box Office $15,924,213
Worldwide Box Office $33,183,640
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,556,364
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,206,269
Total $4,762,633
Further financial details...

Synopsis

What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,845,658 (45.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,607 opening theaters/2,607 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,535,235

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Jordan)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Bahrain)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Syria)
May 9th, 2019 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: August 6th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
October 21st, 2019 by Sony Pictures, released as Brightburn
MPA Rating: R for horror violence/bloody images, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2572 (Cert #52113), 4/3/2019)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Geographical setting: Kansas
Plot point: Alien Encounters, Death of a Partner, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Familicide, Scary Kids, Unexpected Families
Social setting: Adopted Family
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: The H Collective, Troll Court Entertainment, Screen Gems, Stage 6 Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
